title: ColorUp
description: Make the use of colors accessible to all!
body:
## Info:
Very light weight plugin that allows you to use colors on signs and in the chat. Only use the "&" symbol in the chat or on a sign with a colorcode behind (/colorcodes) it and you have colors!

## Commands:

/colorcodes



## Premissions:

colorup.colors

colorup.colorcodes
